summary: PR #2501 improves matching for src/melee/lb/lbshadow.c, specifically lbShadow_8000E9F0 spline tangent code and lbShadow_8000F38C shadow update code. The PR body reports configure+ninja and checkdiff verification for both functions, and the bot report shows score improvements for both unmatched items.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains matching edits for lbShadow_8000E9F0 and lbShadow_8000F38C.

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000E9F0 now preserves the original input parameter as orig_u before scaling u by spline->numcv - 1; the type 0 endpoint check now compares orig_u to 1.0F.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added f32 orig_u; orig_u = u; u *= spline->numcv - 1; if (orig_u == 1.0F)

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000E9F0 rewrites the Bezier intermediate expression from -((4.0F * t) - 1.0F) to 1.0F - (4.0F * t), and moves it after t2 assignment.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: bez1 expression and declaration-order changes in case 1

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000F38C adds a local static inline lbShadow_Sqrtf using __frsqrte with three Newton-style refinement steps, static f64 constants, a zeroed u8 pad array, and volatile f32 y, then replaces the guarded sqrtf call with lbShadow_Sqrtf(dist).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static inline f32 lbShadow_Sqrtf(f32 x)

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000F38C changes stack/local shaping: PAD_STACK decreases from 0x48 to 0x10, and nextGx, hasObj, i, and shadow2 are hoisted to function scope rather than declared in inner blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_GObj* nextGx; s32 hasObj; s32 i; HSD_Shadow* shadow2

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000F38C introduces a local HSD_JObj* jobj temporary before HSD_ShadowAddObject instead of casting gobj->hsd_obj directly in the call.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObj* jobj = (HSD_JObj*) gobj->hsd_obj; HSD_ShadowAddObject(fp2->x20A4.shadow, jobj)

what_changed.text: The PR reports matching-score improvements for lbShadow_8000E9F0 and lbShadow_8000F38C, with bot output showing lbShadow_8000E9F0 from 93.27% to 95.81% and lbShadow_8000F38C from 99.15% to 99.70%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: decomp-dev bot report table

smart_moves.text: Preserving orig_u before scaling allowed the endpoint comparison to use the original spline parameter while still reusing u as the scaled segment coordinate.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: orig_u = u; u *= spline->numcv - 1; if (orig_u == 1.0F)

smart_moves.text: The PR used narrow function-level checkdiff commands for the two claimed functions rather than relying only on a full build.
The shadow-update edits kept the changed scope to one translation unit and the two target functions reported in the PR body.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Improves lbshadow spline tangent and shadow update matching

decomp_lessons.text: When an argument is later transformed for computation but the source logic also needs the original value, keeping an explicit original-value local can improve matchability and readability.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added orig_u and changed endpoint comparison to orig_u

decomp_lessons.text: For matching work, algebraically equivalent expressions and statement ordering can matter; here the Bezier coefficient expression and t2/bez1 order changed as part of a score-improving PR.

Function-scope hoisting of locals and narrowed PAD_STACK usage can be a matching tactic, but this PR only supports it for lbShadow_8000F38C with the reported checkdiff/bot improvement; it should not be generalized without verifier evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hoisted nextGx, hasObj, i, shadow2 and PAD_STACK change

naming_conventions.text: orig_u names a saved copy of the original u parameter before in-place scaling.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: f32 orig_u; orig_u = u; u *= spline->numcv - 1

naming_conventions.text: lbShadow_Sqrtf is named as a file-local lbShadow helper wrapping the square-root approximation used by lbShadow_8000F38C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline f32 lbShadow_Sqrtf(f32 x)

naming_conventions.text: jobj is used as a short local role name for an HSD_JObj* cast from gobj->hsd_obj before passing it to HSD_ShadowAddObject.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Preserve original argument value in a separate local before mutating the working parameter to influence floating-point and branch code shape.
Use explicit __frsqrte-based sqrt approximation with f64 constants, repeated refinement, volatile f32 result storage, and local padding to match the target sqrt sequence in lbShadow_8000F38C.
Adjust local lifetimes by moving temporaries out of inner blocks when trying to match register/stack allocation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: nextGx, hasObj, i, shadow2 moved to outer declarations

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Narrow PAD_STACK from 0x48 to 0x10 after introducing the lbShadow_Sqrtf helper and local-lifetime changes.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments are present in the loaded PR slice.
Automation reported two unmatched-item improvements for GALE01: lbShadow_8000E9F0 and lbShadow_8000F38C.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

follow_up_queries: lbShadow_8000F38C local hoisting nextGx hasObj shadow2 i

notes: Evidence is strong for what changed and for reported checkdiff/build commands.
The slice has no human review comments, so reviewer intent or requested changes cannot be inferred.
The PR body and bot report show score improvements, but neither function is claimed as fully matched.
Tactics such as PAD_STACK adjustment, volatile storage, padding array, and local hoisting are supported only as this PR's matching edits, not as general style guidance.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Save original spline parameter before in-place scaling
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbShadow_8000E9F0, adding orig_u before scaling u let the endpoint check use the original parameter while the scaled u drove segment index/t calculations; the PR reports this as part of a score improvement.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep stack/local-lifetime tactics tied to checkdiff evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2501 changed PAD_STACK and hoisted several locals in lbShadow_8000F38C, with PR-body checkdiff commands and a bot score improvement. This is evidence for a narrow matching tactic, not a broad source-style rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK and local hoisting changes

rejection_notes: Do not promote lbShadow_Sqrtf's volatile local, padding array, or static f64 constants as general decomp style; the PR only supports them as a local matching tactic for lbShadow_8000F38C.
Do not claim either function fully matched; the PR and bot report only show partial score improvements.
